justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted "this Wednesday" as June 3rd, then correctly identified the user's correction to "Thursday, June 4th", but then failed to correctly interpret the time in subsequent turns, always defaulting to 00:00-01:00 instead of 09:00-10:00.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without offering alternative times or days, simply asking the user to provide new preferences.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in multiple unproductive turns by repeatedly asking the user for new times after reporting unavailability, instead of proactively suggesting alternatives.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times and its repeated failure to correctly interpret the time of day for the appointment.
